info.name: Help PR — Mobile APIs only
info.description:
Postman collection for **`/api/mobile/*`** (common + partner + customer apps).

## Razorpay online payments (test mode)

| Flow | Where in collection |
|------|---------------------|
| Partner subscription upgrade | **Partner → Subscription** — Apply (Razorpay online) → Get payment status |
| Customer order payment | **User** — Create order payment (Razorpay online) → Get order payment status |
| Quote deposit | **User → Quotes** — Convert quote to order (Razorpay deposit) → Get quote deposit payment status |

**Env (Lambda):** `RAZORPAY_*` on server; set `{{baseUrl}}` in Postman. Webhook: `{RAZORPAY_BASE_URL}/api/razorpay/razorpayWebhook`.

**Additional charges:** no separate Razorpay API — customer pays updated due via **order payments**. **Partner payouts:** admin `/api/partner_payout` (manual bank transfer), not Razorpay.

Full audit: `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`

## Common (partner + user)
1. **Location** → States → Cities → Areas → Pincodes (`/api/mobile/states`, …)

## Partner
1. **Common → Location** → Register/Login → **Forgot password** (3-step OTP reset: forgot → verify OTP → reset password) → **Home** (assigned quotes + orders) → **Quotes** (accept/reject pending) → **Orders** (assigned jobs) → **Appointments** (calendar on partner orders) → Update → **Bank accounts (list)** → Catalog → My services

## Customer (User)
1. **Login** → **Verify OTP** (dev OTP: `123456`) — or **Forgot password** (3-step email OTP reset when customer has email on file)
2. **Pincodes (search)** or set `{{homeLocation}}` — e.g. `500032,Gachibowli,Hyderabad,Telangana`
3. **Home** — categories, services, partners for franchise (Bearer + `location` query)
4. **Partners** — list → **Get partner profile** (catalog + professional summary) → **Create quote** with `partner_id`
5. **Addresses** — create / get / update / delete
6. **Quotes** — create / list / get / update / cancel / **convert-to-order** (`franchise_id` required on create)
7. **Posts** — feed, liked/saved lists, like, save, share, report
8. **Orders & payments** — list orders → **Create order payment (Razorpay online)** or cash/offline → **Get order payment status**
9. **Update** — multipart `profile_photo` + profile fields

**Partner 403** (catalog/bank / my-services while not approved): account must be verified first.

**Appointments:** `docs/APPOINTMENT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`

**Chat & disputes:** User → **Chat & Disputes** (support chat, raise/list disputes). See `docs/CHAT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`.

item.name: Common
item.description: Shared mobile dropdowns — `routes/mobile/common/location_routes.js`. No Bearer. Used by partner and customer apps.

item.name: Location
item.description: Run in order: States → Cities → Areas → Pincodes. Sets `{{stateId}}`, `{{cityId}}`, `{{areaId}}`, `{{pincode}}`.

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/states** — sets `{{stateId}}`
**GET /api/mobile/cities?state_id=** — sets `{{cityId}}`
**GET /api/mobile/areas?city_id=** — sets `{{areaId}}`
**GET /api/mobile/pincodes?area_id=** — dropdown items `{ pincode }`; sets `{{pincode}}`

item.name: Partner
item.description: Partner mobile — `partner_routes.js`, `quote_routes.js`, `order_routes.js`, `my_services_routes.js`, `bank_account_routes.js`. Use **Common → Location** for dropdowns. **Auth:** Register / Login / Forgot password. **Home:** assigned quotes + orders. **Quotes:** list pending assigned quotes → accept or reject. **Orders:** list and view orders assigned to the logged-in partner. **Bank accounts:** list logged-in partner's accounts only.

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/register**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** name, email, phone_number, password, date_of_birth (18+)
- Response: `data.auth_token`, `data._id`, `data.email`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `password`
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM push token)
- **200** `data`: `auth_token`, `verification_status` (1 pending, 2 approved, 3 rejected), `verification_status_message`, `rejected_reasone`, `city_name`, …

**401:** `Invalid email.` | `Invalid password.`

Rejected partners can log in; catalog/bank/my-services **update** still requires approval.

**POST /api/mobile/partner/google-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Google Sign-In ID token from the partner mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM), `phone_number`, `date_of_birth` (used on first-time registration only)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Google (`GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_ANDROID_PARTNER`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS_PARTNER`, optional `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_PARTNER` / `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB_PARTNER`)
- Existing partner by `google_id` or email → login (`registration_type` unchanged)
- New partner → creates account (`registration_type: 2`), assigns basic subscription + notification settings
- **200** `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Login**)

**400:** Missing `id_token` | Google account without email
**401:** Invalid or expired Google token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Google account conflict with customer or other account type
**500:** Google client IDs not configured

**POST /api/mobile/partner/apple-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Apple identity token from the partner mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM), `phone_number`, `date_of_birth`, `name` (first authorization only)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Apple JWKS (`APPLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS_PARTNER`, optional `APPLE_CLIENT_ID_PARTNER` / `APPLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB_PARTNER`)
- Existing partner by `apple_id` or email → login
- New partner → creates account (`registration_type: 3`), assigns basic subscription + notification settings
- **200** `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Login**)

**400:** Missing `id_token` | Apple account without email on registration
**401:** Invalid or expired Apple token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Apple account conflict
**500:** Apple client IDs not configured

exec: pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.');

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/forgot-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email` (registered partner email, `type: 2` only)

### Behavior
- Sends a 6-digit OTP to the registered email (never sends a password)
- Always returns a generic success message to prevent email enumeration
- Invalidates any previous password-reset OTP for the account
- OTP expires in **5 minutes**; resend cooldown **60 seconds** per account

### Response
- **200:** `If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.`

**400:** `Email is required.` | `Invalid email format.`

Requires `EMAIL_USER` / `EMAIL_PASS` in server env.

**Next step:** **Verify forgot password OTP** → **Reset password** → **Login** with the new password.

exec: pm.test('Verify forgot password OTP success', function () {

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/verify-forgot-password-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `otp` (6-digit code from email)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP (max **5 attempts**, **5 min** expiry)
- On success returns a JWT `reset_token` valid for **10 minutes**
- Saves `reset_token` to `{{passwordResetToken}}`

### Response
- **200:** `{ verified: true, reset_token: "..." }`

**400:** `Invalid OTP.` | `OTP has expired.` | `OTP is required.` | `OTP must be a 6-digit code.`
**429:** `Maximum OTP verification attempts exceeded. Please request a new OTP.`

Set `{{passwordResetOtp}}` from the email received after **Forgot password**.

**POST /api/mobile/partner/reset-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `reset_token` (from **Verify forgot password OTP**), `new_password`

### Password rules
- Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character (`@$!%*?&`)

### Response
- **200:** `Password updated successfully`

**400:** `Invalid or expired reset token.` | password validation errors

**Next step:** **Login** with `{{email}}` and the new password.

**GET /api/mobile/partner/home**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner (`type` 2) after **Login**
- No query params — returns work assigned to the logged-in partner only

**200 `data`:**
- `quotes.pending[]` — up to **10** pending quotes (`partner_id` = caller), newest first
- `quotes.accepted[]` — up to **10** accepted quotes, newest first
- `orders.live[]` — up to **10** orders with `order_status` = `in-progress` and `partner_work_status` = `in-progress`; sorted like customer home (today-overlap first, then future, then past)
- `orders.in_progress[]` — up to **10** orders with `order_status` = `in-progress` and `partner_work_status` = `pending`; same schedule sort as `live`
- `orders.completed[]` — up to **10** completed orders by `updated_at` desc

Quote rows use the same shape as **GET /api/mobile/partner/quotes**. Order rows are compact cards with customer, category, service, franchise, schedule, and payment rollups.

Sets `{{quoteId}}` and `{{orderId}}` from first home items when present.

item.name: Catalog
item.description: Bearer required. Run **after** Update sets location (`franchise_id`). **GET /categories** returns each category with nested `services`.

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/categories**

- **400** if no `franchise_id` — complete location on Update first
- **200** `data[]`: `_id`, `name`, `desc`, `image_url`, `services[]` (`_id`, `name`, `desc`, `tax`, `image_url`, `category_id`)
- Sets `{{categoryId}}`, `{{serviceId}}`, `{{serviceId2}}` from first category's services

item.name: My services
item.description: Bearer required. Partner's **saved** catalog. Each service includes `is_active` (local on/off). **PATCH status** and **PUT** require `verification_status` = 2 (approved). Run **List** first to set `{{partnerServiceId}}`. Run **Catalog** to refresh `{{categoryId}}` / `{{serviceId}}` for **Update**.

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/my-services**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **200** `data[]`: grouped by category — `category_id`, `category_name`, `services[]` with `_id` (partner_service row), `service_id`, `service_name`, `description`, `price`, `is_active`, `is_accept_request`, `tax`, `payment_type`, `minimum_deposit`, …
- Empty catalog → `data: []`
- Sets `{{partnerServiceId}}`, `{{partnerServiceId2}}` (second row, for bulk status), `{{myServiceCategoryId}}`, `{{myServiceServiceId}}`, `{{myServicePrice}}`, `{{myServiceDescription}}`, `{{myServiceIsActive}}`

**PATCH /api/mobile/partner/my-services/:id/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Path:** `id` = partner_service row `_id` from **List my services** (`{{partnerServiceId}}`)
- **Body:** `{ "is_active": true | false }` (boolean or `"true"` / `"false"`)
- **200:** `{ success, status, message, data: { _id, is_active } }`
- **403** if not approved | **404** if row not found

**PATCH /api/mobile/partner/my-services/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Body:** `updates` non-empty array; each item **required:** `_id` (partner_service row), `is_active` (true | false)
- **200:** `{ success, status, message, data: { updated: [{ _id, is_active }, ...] } }`
- **400** duplicate `_id` in request | **403** if not approved | **404** if any row not found

Run **List my services** first. For a single-row catalog, use one object in `updates` or set `{{partnerServiceId2}}` to a second row id.

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/my-services**

- **Auth:** Bearer — partner must be **approved** (`verification_status` 2)
- **Body:** `services` array; each item **required:** `_id` (partner_service row from List), `category_id`, `service_id`, `price`, `description`
- **200:** updated grouped `data[]` + message
- **403** if not approved | **404** if `_id` not found | **409** duplicate `service_id` on another row

Run **List my services** first. Use **Catalog → Categories** to change `categoryId` / `serviceId` dropdown values.

item.name: Subscription
item.description: Bearer required. **GET /subscription** — current plan + wallet balance. **GET /subscription-plans** — catalog. **POST /subscription/change/preview** then **POST /subscription/change** — upgrade (wallet + cash, or wallet + Razorpay `online_amount`) or downgrade (wallet credit). **GET /subscription/change/:changeId/payment-status** — poll after online payment. See `docs/SUBSCRIPTION_CHANGE_FRONTEND.md`.

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription/changes**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **Query:** `page` (default 1), `limit` (default 10, max 50)
- **200** `data.records[]`: completed upgrades/downgrades with proration and payment split

**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **200** `data`: `subscription` (plan, dates, status), `wallet_balance`, `days_used`, `days_total`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change/preview**

- **Body:** `target_plan_id` (ObjectId from **List plans**)
- **200** `data`: `change_type` (upgrade|downgrade), proration breakdown, `amount_to_pay` or `wallet_credit`, `wallet_balance`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change**

**Upgrade (cash):** `wallet_amount` + `cash_amount` must equal `amount_to_pay` from preview. Omitted amounts default to 0. Use **Apply plan change (upgrade — Razorpay online)** for `online_amount` instead of cash.

**Downgrade:** send only `target_plan_id` (no payment). Unused value credited to wallet; new plan period starts immediately.

exec: pm.test('Online change initiated or completed', function () {

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change** — upgrade via Razorpay (UPI / card / netbanking).

- **Body:** `target_plan_id`, `wallet_amount` (optional), `online_amount` (required for gateway portion)
- `wallet_amount + online_amount` must equal `amount_to_pay` from **Preview plan change**
- Use **either** `cash_amount` **or** `online_amount`, not both
- Partner profile must have `email` or `phone_number`

**202** `data.change.payment_url` — open in browser/WebView to pay; sets `{{subscriptionChangeId}}` and `{{subscriptionPaymentUrl}}`

**200** if no online portion (wallet-only)

After payment, Razorpay webhook completes the change. Poll **Get change payment status** or **Get current subscription**.

**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change/:changeId/payment-status**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **Path:** `changeId` — from **Apply plan change (upgrade — Razorpay online)** (`{{subscriptionChangeId}}`)

**200** `data`: `status`, `payment_status`, `target_plan`, `applied_at`, `wallet_balance`, optional `sync` object

Poll after paying until `status` is `completed`. If still `pending` after payment, **call again** — backend polls Razorpay and applies the change when paid (`sync.synced: true`).
**POST /api/mobile/partner/subscription/change** — downgrade only (`target_plan_id` lower tier). No `wallet_amount` / `cash_amount`.

**GET /api/mobile/partner/subscription-plans**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}` (run **Login** or **Register** first)
- **200** `data[]`: `_id`, `plan_name` (basic | silver | gold | platinum), `plan_description`, `price`, `duration`, `duration_type`, `priority`, `is_active`, timestamps
- Plans with `deleted_at` null only (includes inactive plans; filter client-side if needed)
- Sets `{{subscriptionPlanId}}` from first plan in list

item.name: Quotes
item.description:
Partner quote actions (Phase 2). **Auth:** Bearer partner JWT (`type` 2) after **Login**.

**Flow:** Customer creates quote with `partner_id` → **pending** → partner **List** → **Accept** (`accepted`) or **Reject** (`failed`).

Use the same `{{quoteId}}` as customer flow (customer **Create quote** sets it) or pick from **List quotes**.

query.description: Default server filter: pending + accepted when empty

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/quotes**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner (`type` 2)
- Returns quotes where `partner_id` = logged-in partner
- Default statuses: **pending**, **accepted** (when `status` query omitted)
- **200:** `totalItems`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]`

**GET /api/mobile/partner/quotes/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — must be assigned on quote (`partner_id`)

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/quotes/:id/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner
- **Body:** `{ "status": "accepted" }`
- Only from **pending** → **accepted**
- Customer can then proceed to deposit / convert (Phase 3)

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/quotes/:id/status**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner
- **Body:** `{ "status": "failed", "rejection_reason": "..." }` (optional `cancellation_reason`)
- Only from **pending** → **failed**

item.name: Orders
item.description:
Partner assigned orders. **Auth:** Bearer partner JWT (`type` 2) after **Login**.

**Flow:** List order → optional **Additional charges** (`POST .../additional-charges`) — increases order `total_price`; **customer pays via mobile order payments** (Razorpay online on `POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:id/payments`, not on charge create) → **Start work** → **Complete** (proof photos). Optional `publish_as_post=true`.

query.description: in-progress | completed | cancelled | refunded — leave empty for all
pending | in-progress | completed — leave empty for all
Search order id, customer, address, description, quote text
Customer rollup: unpaid | paid | partially_paid | refund | partially_refund

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/orders**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner (`type` 2)
- Lists orders assigned to the authenticated partner (`partner_id`)
- **Pagination:** `page`, `limit` (max 50)
- **Search:** `search` (or `q`) on order fields plus linked customer, category, service, city, franchise, and quote text
- **Filters:** `status`, `partner_work_status`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `is_paid`, `user_payment_status` (or `payment_status`), `partner_payment_status`, and optional ObjectId filters: `franchise_id`, `user_id`, `category_id`, `service_id`, `city_id`, `address_id`
- **200:** `totalItems`, `todayCount`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]` (includes `partner_work_status`)

**GET /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — order must be assigned to caller (`partner_id`)
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)

**200 `record`:** full order detail including `partner_summary` (partner earnings rollup), `partner_work_status`, `work_proof_image_urls`, `service_items[]`, `additional_charges[]`, payments, refunds when applicable. Use `partner_summary` for money UI; extra charges: partner `amount`, not `total_amount`.

**404** order not found or not assigned to partner | **400** invalid order id

**GET /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/invoice**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner
- Downloads a printable HTML invoice for one order assigned to the caller (`partner_id`)
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)
- **200:** `text/html` attachment (`invoice-<orderId>.html`) with line items, additional charges, totals, and customer payments
- Uses the same invoice builder as user `GET /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/invoice` and admin `GET /api/order/invoice/:id`

**404** order not found or not assigned to partner | **400** invalid order id

**GET /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — order assigned to caller
- **200:** `records[]` (each with `partner_amount`, `customer_billed_total`) + `partner_summary`

Also included on **Get order details** (`record.additional_charges`).

**POST /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — order must be assigned to caller
- **Required:** `amount` (≥ 0, partner portion)
- **Optional:** `label`, `description`, `payment_method`, `charge_type`

**201:** `record` (with `partner_amount`), `partner_summary`, `order` pricing rollup

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges/:chargeId**

- Partial body; recalculates order totals
- **200:** `record`, `partner_summary`, `order` rollup

**DELETE /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/additional-charges/:chargeId**

- Soft-deletes charge and refreshes order totals
- **200:** `partner_summary`, `order` rollup

**PUT /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/work-status**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner
- Order must be `in-progress` with `partner_work_status` = `pending`
- Sets `partner_work_status` to `in-progress` (partner started the job)

**200:** `record` with updated order detail

item.name: Complete order (proof photos + optional feed post)

formdata.description: Optional completion notes; required when publish_as_post=true
true to create user-feed partner post from proof images

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/partner/orders/:orderId/complete**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner
- **Multipart:** 1–4 `images` (proof of service)
- **Preconditions:**
  - `partner_work_status` = `in-progress` (call **Start work** first)
  - Customer fully paid (`user_payment_status` = `paid`)
- Sets `partner_work_status` and `order_status` to `completed`
- Saves `work_proof_image_urls`, `work_completed_at`
- Optional `publish_as_post=true` + `description` creates linked `partner_post` for user feed

**409** if customer has not paid in full | **200:** `record`, optional `post`

formdata.description: Catalog + approved (status 2). Disable while pending to avoid 403.
JSON array = replace all. Object = upsert one. Approved only.

request.description:
**PUT /api/mobile/partner/update**

**Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
**Body:** `multipart/form-data` (do not set Content-Type manually)

### Before sending
1. **Common → Location** → States → Cities → Areas → Pincodes
2. **Login** (or Register)
3. While pending: disable `partner_services` and `bank_account` (or clear values)
4. After approval (`verification_status` = 2): run **Catalog**, then enable catalog + bank fields
5. Select files: `image`, `aadhar_card` (and optional other verification files)

| Section | Fields |
|---------|--------|
| Profile / location | gender, experience, state_id, city_id, area_id, pincode, address, image, name, email, phone_number, date_of_birth, device_token, password, confirm_password |
| Services (approved) | partner_services |
| Banks (approved) | bank_account |
| Documents | aadhar_card, pan_card, driving_license, vehicle_registration, police_verification_certificate |

`partner_documents` JSON is not supported. To list banks without updating profile, use **Bank accounts → List bank accounts**.

item.name: Bank accounts
item.description: Bearer required. **List** returns only the logged-in partner's bank accounts (`bank_account_routes.js`). Add or replace accounts via **Update** (`bank_account` field; requires `verification_status` = 2).

query.description: Optional — filter by bank name, branch, holder name, account number, or IFSC

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/bank-accounts/get**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner `{{token}}` (`type` 2) after **Login**
- Returns **only** the logged-in partner's active bank accounts (`deleted_at: null`)
- No `partner_id` query — scoped from JWT `req.user.id`
- **200** `data[]`: `_id`, `partner_id`, `bank_name`, `account_holder_name`, `account_number`, `ifsc_code`, `branch_name`, `is_primary`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `deleted_at`
- Sorted: primary first, then newest
- Empty list → `data: []`
- **401** no/invalid token | **403** not a partner account | **404** partner not found
- Optional query: `search` (bank name, branch, holder, account number, IFSC)
- Sets `{{partnerBankAccountId}}` from first row when present

item.name: Financial & Wallet
item.description: Partner earnings overview (per-order pending/paid) and wallet balance + ledger. Same order-derived logic as admin `GET /api/order/financial-payments/getAll`. See `docs/PARTNER_FINANCIAL_MOBILE.md`.

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/partner/financial-payments** — Per-order partner earnings (paid / pending). Includes `totals` for the full filtered set (not just current page).
**GET /api/mobile/partner/financial-payments/:orderId** — Order earnings summary (`record`) plus `partner_summary` and `order_payments[]` line items. `:orderId` = order Mongo `_id`.

query.description: Optional — period totals on ledger date
Optional — period totals on ledger date

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/partner/wallet** — Current `wallet_balance` + optional filtered `totals` (credits, debits, net_change).
**GET /api/mobile/partner/wallet/transactions** — Paginated wallet ledger with `wallet_balance`, filtered `totals`, and `records[]`.

item.name: Appointments
item.description:
Partner calendar — appointments on assigned orders only. **Auth:** Bearer partner JWT (`type` 2). See `docs/APPOINTMENT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`.

**Flow:** List orders (sets `{{orderId}}`) → List appointments → Create → Update → Delete

query.description: Search title, order id, service name

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/partner/appointments**

- **Auth:** Bearer partner — scoped to `partner_id` from JWT
- **Pagination:** `page`, `limit` (max 50)
- **Date filters:** `from_date`, `to_date` on `service_date`
- **Optional:** `order_id`, `keyword`
- **200:** `totalItems`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]`

**GET /api/mobile/partner/appointments/order/:orderId**

- Order must be assigned to caller (`partner_id`)
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)
- **200:** `order_id`, `order_unique_id`, `records[]`

**POST /api/mobile/partner/appointments**

- **Required:** `order_id` (partner's assigned order), `service_date` (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Optional:** `title`, `start_time`, `end_time` (HH:mm)
- Partner and service name filled server-side from order
- **200:** `record`

**GET /api/mobile/partner/appointments/:appointmentId**

- Mongo `_id` or business id (`AP1001`) — use `{{appointmentId}}` or `{{appointmentUniqueId}}`
**PUT /api/mobile/partner/appointments/:appointmentId** — partial update; at least one field required.
**DELETE /api/mobile/partner/appointments/:appointmentId** — soft delete

item.name: Posts
item.description: Partner portfolio posts — `post_routes.js`. Requires verified partner. See `docs/PARTNER_POST_FRONTEND.md`.

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/partner/posts/order-options**

formdata.value: Sample legacy work post from Postman.

request.description: **POST /api/mobile/partner/posts** — multipart, 1-4 images.
**GET /api/mobile/partner/posts**
**GET /api/mobile/partner/posts/:postId**
**DELETE /api/mobile/partner/posts/:postId**

item.name: User
item.description:
Customer mobile — OTP, forgot password (email), home, addresses, orders, quotes, profile. Order: **Login** → **Verify OTP** → **Pincodes (search)** (sets `homeLocation`) → **Home** → **Orders** → **Addresses** → **Quotes** → **Update** (multipart). Address dropdowns: **Common → Location**.

**Razorpay:** **Create order payment (Razorpay online)** + **Get order payment status**; quote **Convert (Razorpay deposit)**. Additional charges: pay via order payments after partner adds charge (no separate Razorpay endpoint).

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `phone_number` (E.164 style, e.g. `+919876543210`)

### Behavior
- If phone is new → creates customer (`type: 4`) in `users`
- If customer exists → reuses account
- If phone belongs to partner/admin → **409**
- Stores hashed OTP in `otp` collection (dev OTP: **123456**, 10 min expiry)
- **429** if a valid OTP was already sent for this number

No SMS is sent in the current build.

**POST /api/mobile/user/verify-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `phone_number`, `otp` (use `123456` in dev)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP → issues JWT on `data.auth_token`
- Updates `device_token`, `last_signin` on user
- Deletes used OTP row

**400:** Invalid or expired OTP
**401:** Customer not found (run Login first)
**403:** Account blocked

**POST /api/mobile/user/google-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Google Sign-In ID token from the mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Google (`GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_ANDROID`, `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS`, optional `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` / `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB`)
- Finds customer by `google_id`, or links existing customer by email, or creates new customer (`registration_type: 2`)
- Returns JWT on `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Verify OTP**)

**400:** Missing `id_token`
**401:** Invalid or expired Google token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Google account conflict with another account type
**500:** Google client IDs not configured on server

**POST /api/mobile/user/apple-login**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `id_token` (Apple identity token from the mobile app)
- **Optional:** `device_token` (FCM), `name` (first authorization only, from client credential)

### Behavior
- Verifies `id_token` with Apple JWKS (`APPLE_CLIENT_ID_IOS`, optional `APPLE_CLIENT_ID` / `APPLE_CLIENT_ID_WEB`)
- Finds customer by `apple_id`, or links by email, or creates new customer (`registration_type: 3`)
- Returns JWT on `data.auth_token` (same shape as **Verify OTP**)

**400:** Missing `id_token`
**401:** Invalid or expired Apple token
**403:** Account blocked
**409:** Email/Apple account conflict
**500:** Apple client IDs not configured

exec: pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.');

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/forgot-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email` (registered customer email, `type: 4` only)

### Behavior
- Sends a 6-digit OTP to the registered email (never sends a password)
- Always returns a generic success message to prevent email enumeration
- Invalidates any previous password-reset OTP for the account
- OTP expires in **5 minutes**; resend cooldown **60 seconds** per account

### Response
- **200:** `If an account exists, an OTP has been sent.`

**400:** `Email is required.` | `Invalid email format.`

Customer **sign-in** is normally OTP via **Login** → **Verify OTP**. Use this flow when the customer has an email on file. Set `{{customerEmail}}` via **Update** or collection variables. Requires `EMAIL_USER` / `EMAIL_PASS` on the server.

**Next step:** **Verify forgot password OTP** → **Reset password**.

exec: pm.test('Verify forgot password OTP success', function () {

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/verify-forgot-password-otp**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `email`, `otp` (6-digit code from email)

### Behavior
- Validates OTP (max **5 attempts**, **5 min** expiry)
- On success returns a JWT `reset_token` valid for **10 minutes**
- Saves `reset_token` to `{{passwordResetToken}}`

### Response
- **200:** `{ verified: true, reset_token: "..." }`

**400:** `Invalid OTP.` | `OTP has expired.` | `OTP is required.` | `OTP must be a 6-digit code.`
**429:** `Maximum OTP verification attempts exceeded. Please request a new OTP.`

Set `{{passwordResetOtp}}` from the email received after **Forgot password**.

**POST /api/mobile/user/reset-password**

- No Authorization
- **Required:** `reset_token` (from **Verify forgot password OTP**), `new_password`

### Password rules
- Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character (`@$!%*?&`)

### Response
- **200:** `Password updated successfully`

**400:** `Invalid or expired reset token.` | password validation errors

**GET /api/mobile/user/home?location=**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}` (run **Verify OTP** first)
- **Query `location`:** `pincode,area_name,city_name,state_name` — same line as **Pincodes (search)** e.g. `500032,Gachibowli,Hyderabad,Telangana`

**200** `data`:
- `services_available` (boolean; `false` when area has no active franchise — `franchise_id`/`franchise_name` null, `categories`/`partners` empty; `orders` still returned)
- `franchise_id`, `franchise_name`
- `location` (resolved ids)
- `categories[]` with nested `services[]` (`partner_count`, `price_range` from **subscribed** partners only; `price`, `payment_type`)
- `partners[]` (top **20** by `plan_priority` desc; active subscription; `subscription_plan_name`, `categories[]` → `services[]`)
- `orders.in_progress[]` (up to **10**) — sorted by schedule: today-overlap (`from_date`–`to_date` includes today UTC) first, then future dates ascending, then past; tie-break `updated_at` desc; excludes refunded payment rollups; not location-scoped
- `orders.completed[]` (up to **10**) — sorted by `updated_at` desc; no schedule date filter; same refund/location rules as in-progress
- Each order has hydrated `category_id`, `service_id`, `partner_id`, `franchise_id` objects (same shape as **GET /api/mobile/user/orders** list) plus `category_name`, `service_name`, `partner_name`, `partner_profile_url`

**Auth:** customer only (`type` 4). **400** invalid location format | **404** location not found

query.description: in-progress | completed | cancelled | refunded — leave empty for all
Search in unique_id, address, order_description, customer_description, transaction_id

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/orders**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Lists orders for authenticated customer only
- **Pagination:** `page`, `limit` (max 50)
- **Search:** `search` (or `q`) on order fields plus linked user, partner, category, service, city, franchise, and quote text
- **Filters:** `status`, `from_date`, `to_date`, `is_paid`, `user_payment_status` (or `payment_status`), and optional ObjectId filters: `franchise_id`, `partner_id`, `category_id`, `service_id`, `city_id`, `address_id`
- **200:** `totalItems` (all matching filters), `todayCount` (subset whose schedule overlaps **today** UTC, same filters), `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]` — each record includes hydrated `user_id`, `partner_id`, `employee_id`, `franchise_id`, `city_id`, `category_id`, `service_id`, `created_by_id`, `address_id`, and `quote_id` objects (admin getAll parity); `refunds` / `refund_summary` when applicable; `service_items` is omitted from list rows

query.description: Optional — payment created on/after (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC day)
Optional — payment created on/before (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC day)
Optional — limit to one owned order
cash | upi | card | online | bank_transfer | other

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/order-payments**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Lists **customer** `order_payment` rows across **all** of the caller's orders (not partner ledger rows)
- **Pagination:** `page` (default 1), `limit` (default 10, max 50)
- **Date range:** `from_date`, `to_date` (YYYY-MM-DD, UTC calendar days) — filters on payment `created_at`; one param alone matches that single day
- **Optional filters:** `order_id` (owned order only), `status` (`pending` | `completed` | `failed` | `refunded`), `payment_method` (`cash` | `upi` | `card` | `online` | `bank_transfer` | `other`)

**200:** `totalItems`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]` — each row includes an `order` summary (`unique_id`, `payment_status`, `is_paid`, `total_price`, `customer_paid_amount`, `customer_due_amount`, `customer_net_paid`)

Sets `{{orderPaymentId}}` and `{{orderId}}` from the first record when present.

**GET /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Returns full detail for one order belonging to the authenticated customer
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)

**200 `record` includes:** hydrated `user_id`, `partner_id`, `employee_id`, `franchise_id`, `city_id`, `category_id`, `service_id`, `created_by_id`, `address_id`, and `quote_id` objects (same shape as orders list / admin getAll); display names (`user_name`, `partner_name`, etc.); **`service_items[]`** with `partner_info`, `service_info`, review fields when present; **`additional_charges`**, **`order_payments`**, **`order_offer`**; **`refunds`**, **`refund_summary`** when applicable; payment breakdown fields.

**404** order not found or not owned by caller | **400** invalid order id

**GET /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/invoice**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Downloads a printable HTML invoice for one order owned by the caller
- **Path `orderId`:** order Mongo `_id` (24-char hex)
- **200:** `text/html` attachment (`invoice-<orderId>.html`) with line items, additional charges, totals, and customer payments
- Uses the same invoice builder as admin `GET /api/order/invoice/:id`

**404** order not found or not owned by caller | **400** invalid order id

**GET /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/payments**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Lists **customer** `order_payment` rows for the caller's order only (not partner ledger rows)
- **404** if order is not owned by caller

**POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/payments**

Record a **customer** payment on the caller's order.

| Field | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `amount` | Yes | > 0 for `online`; >= 0 otherwise |
| `payment_method` | Yes | `cash` \| `upi` \| `card` \| `online` \| `bank_transfer` \| `other` |
| `status` | No | `pending` (default) \| `completed` \| `failed` \| `refunded` — **not** `completed` for `online` |
| `transaction_reference`, `installment_index`, `due_date`, `paid_at`, `notes` | No | Same as admin |

**Cash/offline:** **201** + `record` + `order` rollup.

**`payment_method: online`:** **202** + `record.payment_url` (Razorpay). Open URL, pay, then poll **GET** `.../payments/:paymentId/payment-status`. Re-posting same amount while pending returns same URL (`record.resumed: true`). Profile must have email or phone.
**POST** with `payment_method: online`. Returns **202** and `record.payment_url`. Test card `4111111111111111` or UPI `success@razorpay`. Then run **Get order payment status**.

**GET /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/payments/:paymentId/payment-status**

Poll after Razorpay pay. **200** `data.status` → `completed` when applied; includes `payment_url` while pending, `gateway_payment` when done, and `sync.synced: true` if webhook was missed.

**PUT /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/payments/:paymentId**

Update a **customer** payment row on the caller's order. Partial body allowed. Re-syncs order payment status.

**DELETE /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/payments/:paymentId**

Soft-delete a **customer** payment on the caller's order. Re-syncs `order_payment_status` / due amounts.

**POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/review**

Submit or update a customer review for a **completed** order.

| Field | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `rating` | Yes | Number **1–5** (decimals allowed, e.g. 4.5) |
| `review_text` | No | Free-text review |
| `service_items_id` | No* | Order service line `_id` — required when order has multiple service lines |

**Rules:** customer token only; order must belong to caller; order + line must be `completed`.

**Side effects:** updates partner overall rating, global service rating, and partner+service rating rollups.

**200 `record`:** `order_id`, `service_items_id`, `rating`, `review_text`, `reviewed_at`, `partner_id`, `service_id`

query.description: basic | silver | gold | platinum — leave empty to skip
Filter partners offering this category; price_range scoped to category services. Disabled by default — enable only when filtering.
Filter partners offering this service; each partner gets single price (no range). Disabled by default — enable only when filtering.
Min partner_service.price — scoped with category_id / service_id when set

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/partners**

Run **Home** first (sets `{{franchiseId}}`). Optional filters are **disabled by default** in this request so you get all eligible partners for the franchise — enable `category_id` / `service_id` only when you want to narrow the list.

| Query | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `franchise_id` | Yes | Franchise ObjectId |
| `page` | No | Default 1 (`{{partnersPage}}`) |
| `limit` | No | Default 10, max 50 (`{{partnersLimit}}`) |
| `search` or `q` | No | Partner name (`{{partnerSearch}}`) |
| `plan_name` | No | basic \| silver \| gold \| platinum (`{{partnerPlanName}}`) |
| `category_id` | No | **Filters** to partners offering this category; also scopes `price_range` |
| `service_id` | No | **Filters** to partners offering this service; sets single `price` per partner |
| `min_price` / `max_price` | No | Price band (`{{partnerMinPrice}}`, `{{partnerMaxPrice}}`) |

**Why only 1 partner?** If `category_id` or `service_id` is sent (e.g. from Home variables), only partners with that service **effectively enabled** (franchise + global + partner catalog chain) are returned. Check root `totalItems` vs `data.partners.length`.

**Mobile eligibility** (stricter than admin subscription list): partner `verification_status` = 2, `is_active` true, not blocked; subscription `status` active, not expired; linked plan `is_active` true and not deleted.

**Partner pricing in response:** `service_id` → `price` only; `category_id` (no service) → `price_range` for that category; else `price_range` for all services.

**200:** `totalItems`, `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `data.partners[]` (plan_priority desc).

**GET /api/mobile/user/partners/saved**

No `franchise_id`. Same filters as **Partners (list)**. Each partner includes `franchise_id`, `franchise_name`, `saved_at`, `is_saved: true`. Sorted by most recently saved.

**POST /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `partnerId` | Yes | `{{quotePartnerId}}` — from **Home**, **Partners (list)**, or **Get partner profile** |
| Request body | **No** | API does not read the body. `{}` in Postman is only a placeholder (same as **Like post**). |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

Partner must be verified (`verification_status` 2) with an active subscription in their franchise.

**Responses**
- **201** first save
- **200** already saved (idempotent)
- **404** partner not found / not eligible

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 201,
  "message": "Partner saved successfully.",
  "data": {
    "partner_id": "...",
    "franchise_id": "...",
    "is_saved": true,
    "saved_at": "2026-06-02T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**DELETE /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `partnerId` | Yes | `{{quotePartnerId}}` |
| Request body | **No** | Leave Body empty (DELETE has no payload). |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

**Responses**
- **200** removed from saved list
- **404** partner was not saved

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Partner removed from saved list.",
  "data": {
    "partner_id": "...",
    "is_saved": false
  }
}
```

response.name: 200 Removed

query.description: Optional. Omitted → resolved from partner record
Optional — filter service_ratings and recent_reviews to one service

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId/ratings**

Partner rating summary for customer app.

| Query | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `franchise_id` | No | Optional; omitted → resolved from partner (useful for saved partners) |
| `service_id` | No | Filter to one service |
| `review_limit` | No | Recent reviews (default 10, max 20) |

**200 `data`:**
- `average_rating`, `rating_count` — partner overall
- `service_ratings[]` — per service this partner offers (`average_rating` = partner on that service; `service_average_rating` = global service rating)
- `recent_reviews[]` — latest customer reviews (`order_unique_id`, `rating`, `review_text`, `reviewed_at`, `service_name`)

query.description: Optional. From Home or saved partner row; omitted → resolved from partner record

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId**

Customer partner detail + full catalog for requesting a quote.

| Param / query | Required | Notes |
|---------------|----------|--------|
| `partnerId` | Yes | Partner Mongo `_id` (`{{quotePartnerId}}` from Home, Partners list, or Saved partners) |
| `franchise_id` | No | Optional franchise scope. Omit when opening a saved partner (resolved from partner). Pass when browsing within a franchise (e.g. Home) |

**200 `data.partner`:** name, profile, `experience` / `professional_summary`, subscription plan, optional `business_info`, `location`, `joined_at`, `completed_services_count`, `is_saved`, **`average_rating`**, **`rating_count`**, **`ratings`** `{ average_rating, rating_count }`

**200 `data.categories[].services[]`:** plus **`average_rating`** / **`rating_count`** and **`ratings`** (partner on that service), **`service_average_rating`** / **`service_rating_count`** (global service), `description`, `price`, `tax`, `payment_type`, `minimum_deposit`, `is_accept_request`

Ratings roll up from completed order reviews (`POST /api/mobile/user/orders/:orderId/review`). Use **Get partner ratings** for `service_ratings[]` and `recent_reviews[]`.

**Quote flow:** pick a service → `POST /quotes/create` with `partner_id`, global `service_id`, `category_id`, `total_service_charge` = service `price`.

item.name: Addresses
item.description: Saved delivery addresses. Run **Common → Location** first for dropdown IDs. Bearer required (run **Verify OTP**).

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/addresses/get**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **200** `data[]`: active addresses only (`deleted_at: null` in response; soft-deleted rows are omitted)
- Fields: `_id`, `state_id`, `city_id`, `area_id`, `pincode`, `address`, `state_name`, `city_name`, `area_name`, `address_status`, `deleted_at`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
- Sets `{{addressId}}` from first row

**POST /api/mobile/user/addresses/create**

- **Auth:** Bearer
- **Required:** `state_id`, `city_id`, `area_id`, `pincode` (from **Common → Pincodes** dropdown), `address` (text)
- `pincode` may be string `"560001"` or object `{ "pincode": "560001" }`
- **First address** also copies location into `users` table

**PUT /api/mobile/user/addresses/update/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer
- Path: `{{addressId}}` from Get or Create
- All fields required only if final value is empty (request value or existing saved value)
- If updating location, send all four: `state_id`, `city_id`, `area_id`, `pincode` together

**DELETE /api/mobile/user/addresses/delete/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer
- Soft-deletes the address (row hidden from Get; `deleted_at` set in DB)

item.name: Orders & payments
item.description:
**Customer orders & Razorpay online pay.**

1. **List orders** — sets `{{orderId}}`
2. **Create order payment (Razorpay online)** — **202** + `{{orderPaymentUrl}}`
3. Pay in browser (test card `4111…` / UPI `success@razorpay`)
4. **Get order payment status** — poll until `data.status` is `completed`

**Additional charges:** partner adds charge → customer pays increased due via step 2 (no separate Razorpay on charge API).

See `docs/RAZORPAY_ONLINE_PAYMENTS_AUDIT.md`.

request.description: **GET /api/mobile/user/orders** — sets `orderId` from first order with due amount (or first row).
**POST** `payment_method: online` → **202** + `record.payment_url`.
**GET .../payment-status** — poll after Razorpay; `sync.synced: true` if webhook missed.

item.name: Quotes
item.description:
Customer quote requests (Phase 1). **Auth:** Bearer customer JWT (`type` 4) after **Verify OTP**.

**Prerequisites:** **Home** (`{{franchiseId}}`, `{{categoryId}}`, `{{serviceId}}`), **Addresses → Create** (`{{addressId}}`). For **with partner**, run **Partners (list)** first (`{{quotePartnerId}}`). Partner must **Accept** quote before convert.

**Convert to order:** offline (`cash`, `upi`, …) → **200**; **`payment_method: online`** → **202** + `data.payment.payment_url` — use **Get order payment status** on the new order.

**Two create types (same endpoint):**
| Type | `partner_id` | Initial status |
|------|----------------|----------------|
| Without partner | omit or `""` | **new** |
| With partner | valid partner ObjectId | **pending** |

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/create** — no partner

- **No `partner_id` in body** → quote status **new**, `partner_id` null
- **Pricing:** `total_service_charge` / `total_price` are **0** until a partner is assigned (**Update** with `partner_id` → server sets charge from `partner_service.price`)
- Do not send `total_service_charge` on this flow
- Franchise admin sees quote under `franchise_id`; partner assigned later via **Update** or admin

**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/create** — with partner

- **Required:** `partner_id` (run **Partners (list)** or **Home** to set `{{quotePartnerId}}`)
- **`total_service_charge` optional:** resolved from that partner's `partner_service.price` when omitted
- Status **pending**; partner can **Accept** under **Partner → Quotes**

query.description: new | pending | accepted | success | failed — leave empty for all
Optional — quote_sequence_id, quote_description, cancellation_reason, rejection_reason (alias: q)

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/quotes**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Lists quotes for authenticated customer only
- **Pagination:** `page`, `limit` (max 50)
- **Search:** `search` (or `q`) on `quote_sequence_id`, `quote_description`, `cancellation_reason`, `rejection_reason`
- **Date range:** `from_date`, `to_date` (YYYY-MM-DD) — quotes whose schedule window overlaps the range (same as admin quote list)
- **Filters:** optional `status`, optional `franchise_id`
- **200:** `totalItems` (all matching filters), `todayCount` (subset whose schedule overlaps **today** UTC, same filters), `totalPages`, `currentPage`, `limit`, `records[]`

**GET /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer — own quotes only
- **200** `data`: quote detail with populated refs + partner service enrichment

**PUT /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Allowed only while status is **new** or **pending**
- **Cannot update:** `total_service_charge`, `service_price`, `status`, `franchise_id`
- Assigning `partner_id` on a **new** quote moves status to **pending**
- Send only fields to change

**PUT /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id/cancel**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Sets status to **failed** with optional `cancellation_reason`
- Not allowed on terminal quotes (`success` / `failed`)

**POST /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id/convert-to-order**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Quote must be **accepted** and owned by caller
- **Required:** `amount`, `payment_method`
- `amount` >= `minimum_deposit_amount`

**Offline (`cash`, `upi`, etc.):** **200** — order + completed/pending payment.

**`payment_method: online`:** **202** — pending `order_payment` + `payment.payment_url` (no order yet). Pay via Razorpay, then poll **`GET .../quotes/:id/deposit-payment/:paymentId/payment-status`**; order is created after payment confirms.
Convert with **online** deposit. **202** + `data.payment.payment_url`. Sets `orderPaymentId` and `quoteDepositPaymentId` collection vars for deposit payment-status poll.

**GET /api/mobile/user/quotes/:id/deposit-payment/:paymentId/payment-status**

- **Auth:** Bearer customer
- Poll after **Convert quote to order (Razorpay deposit)**
- Uses `{{quoteDepositPaymentId}}` from convert response (`data.payment._id`)
- Syncs with Razorpay when still pending; returns `order` once deposit is applied and quote converts

**GET /api/mobile/user/pincodes** — global pincode search (not the address-form dropdown).

- **Auth:** Bearer
- Optional `search` query
- **200** `data[]`: `"pincode,area_name,city_name,state_name"` per line

For address forms use **Common → Pincodes** (`/api/mobile/pincodes?area_id=`).

formdata.description: JPEG/PNG/JPG — max 512 KB. Do not set Content-Type header manually.

request.description:
**PUT /api/mobile/user/update**

- **Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
- **Body:** `multipart/form-data` only (do not set Content-Type manually)
- Enable fields you want to update (`name`, `email`, `gender` required only if final value is empty)

| Field | Rules |
|-------|--------|
| `name` | 2–50 chars; saved capitalized (e.g. `Ravi Kumar`) |
| `phone_number` | E.164, unique if sent |
| `email` | valid format; invalid e.g. `ravigmail.com` → `Invalid email format.` |
| `date_of_birth` | valid date, 18+ if sent |
| `gender` | `male`, `female`, or `other` — invalid → `Gender must be male, female, or other.` |
| `profile_photo` | JPEG/PNG/JPG, max 512 KB |

**200** `data`: updated profile + `auth_token`

item.name: Posts
item.description:
Customer post feed, gallery, liked/saved lists, like, save, share, report — `post_routes.js`. See `docs/PARTNER_POST_FRONTEND.md`.

**Suggested order:** **Home** (sets `{{franchiseId}}`) → **Feed** (sets `{{postId}}`) → **Like post** / **Save post** → **Liked posts** / **Saved posts**.

request.description:
**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/feed**

Run **Home** first for `{{franchiseId}}`.

| Query | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| `franchise_id` | Yes | Franchise ObjectId |
| `page` | No | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | No | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Each record includes `partner`, `linked`, `is_liked`, `is_saved`, counts, and `share_url`. Sets `{{postId}}` and `{{postShareToken}}` from the first row.

**GET /api/mobile/user/partners/:partnerId/posts**

Partner work gallery. Same post shape as feed (without nested `partner` on each card). Optional `franchise_id` for scope validation.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/liked**

Customer's liked posts across franchises. **No `franchise_id`.**

| Query | Notes |
|-------|--------|
| `page` | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Only **published** posts are returned. Sorted by most recently liked. Each record includes `liked_at`, `is_liked: true`, `is_saved`, `partner`, and `linked`.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/saved**

Customer's saved posts across franchises. **No `franchise_id`.**

| Query | Notes |
|-------|--------|
| `page` | Default 1 (`{{postsPage}}`) |
| `limit` | Default 10, max 50 (`{{postsLimit}}`) |

Only **published** posts are returned. Sorted by most recently saved. Each record includes `saved_at`, `is_saved: true`, `is_liked`, `partner`, and `linked`.

**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId**

Single post detail. Optional `franchise_id` for franchise scope validation. Includes `is_liked` and `is_saved`.
**GET /api/mobile/user/posts/share/:shareToken** — no auth.

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/like**

Toggle like/unlike. No request body.

**200 `data`:** `{ post_id, is_liked, likes_count }`

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `postId` | Yes | `{{postId}}` — from **Feed** or **Get post** |
| Request body | **No** | API does not read the body. `{}` is a Postman placeholder only. |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

Post must be **published**.

**Responses**
- **201** first save
- **200** already saved (idempotent)
- **404** post not found

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 201,
  "message": "Post saved successfully.",
  "data": {
    "post_id": "...",
    "franchise_id": "...",
    "is_saved": true,
    "saved_at": "2026-06-02T10:00:00.000Z"
  }
}
```

**DELETE /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/save**

| Input | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|--------|
| Path `postId` | Yes | `{{postId}}` |
| Request body | **No** | DELETE has no payload |
| `Authorization` | Yes | Customer Bearer `{{token}}` |

**Responses**
- **200** removed from saved list
- **404** post was not saved

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "status": 200,
  "message": "Post removed from saved list.",
  "data": {
    "post_id": "...",
    "is_saved": false
  }
}
```

response.name: 200 Removed

request.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/share**

Records a share and returns `{ share_url, share_token, shares_count }`. No request body.

**POST /api/mobile/user/posts/:postId/report**

**Body:** `{ reason, details? }` — reasons: `spam`, `inappropriate`, `misleading`, `other`. **409** if already reported.

item.name: Chat & Disputes
item.description:
Customer **support chat** and **order disputes** (completed orders only).

**Doc:** `docs/CHAT_MODULE_FRONTEND.md`

**Flow:** Complete order → **Raise dispute** OR **Start support chat** → use `{{chatId}}` with **39 — Chat → Messages** (admin) or Socket.IO.

Order group chat: `record.chat_id` on **GET order** or admin **GET /api/chat/by-order/:orderId`.

item.name: Raise dispute
item.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/disputes**

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| `order_id` | Yes — completed order owned by customer |
| `reason` | No |
| `description` | No |

**409** if open dispute exists or order not completed.

Sets `{{disputeId}}` and `{{chatId}}`.

item.name: List disputes
item.description: **GET /api/mobile/user/disputes** — paginated list for logged-in customer.

item.name: Get dispute
item.description: **GET /api/mobile/user/disputes/:disputeId**

item.name: Start support chat
item.description:
**POST /api/mobile/user/chats/support**

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| `employee_id` | No — auto-picks franchise employee if omitted |
| `franchise_id` | No |
| `initial_message` | No |

Returns existing open chat for same customer + employee pair.

variable.description: Google Sign-In ID token from the mobile app (POST /api/mobile/user/google-login)
Apple identity token from the mobile app (POST /api/mobile/user/apple-login or partner/apple-login)
From User → Home (first category) or Partner Catalog — used in Partners list category_id
From User → Home (first service) or Partner Catalog — used in Partners list service_id
Target plan for upgrade/downgrade preview and apply
Wallet portion for upgrade (must match preview amount_to_pay with cash)
Cash portion for upgrade (honor system; use upgradeOnlineAmount for Razorpay)
Razorpay online portion for upgrade — must equal amount_to_pay minus wallet_amount
From Apply plan change (upgrade — Razorpay online) — pending/completed change _id
Razorpay checkout URL from online upgrade apply (202 response)
From My services → List — partner_service _id (24 hex)
Price for PUT my-services (number in JSON)
From My services → List — second partner_service _id (bulk status tests)
From My services — is_active on first service (true | false)
Dev OTP — fixed until SMS is enabled
Customer JWT — alias of token after Verify OTP
Customer profile email for Update and forgot-password flow
6-digit OTP from password reset email — set manually after Forgot password
JWT reset token — set by Verify forgot password OTP test script
Optional search text for User → Pincodes (pincode/area/city/state)
CSV line for User → Home: pincode,area_name,city_name,state_name. Set by Pincodes (search) test script.
Partners list — name search; leave empty to skip
Partners list — basic | silver | gold | platinum
Set by User → Home from data.franchise_id
Customer saved address _id — from List or Create address
Address text line for Create/Update address
Quote _id — set by User → Quotes Create/List or Partner → Quotes List
Partner ObjectId for quote create/update — set by Home or Partners (list); leave empty for new (no partner)
Partner base charge for quote create (JSON number)
Last quote status from API response
List filter: new | pending | accepted | success | failed — empty = all (customer) or pending+accepted (partner default)
Quotes list search text (quote_sequence_id, description, cancellation/rejection reason)
Quotes list from_date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) — enable on List quotes request
Quotes list to_date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) — enable on List quotes request
Deposit amount used for convert-to-order (must be >= minimum_deposit_amount)
Set by Convert quote to order (Razorpay deposit) — use for deposit payment-status poll
Payment method for conversion: cash | upi | card | online | bank_transfer | other
Orders list filter: in-progress | completed | cancelled | refunded — empty = all
Partner orders list filter: pending | in-progress | completed — empty = all
Payment row status filter: pending | completed | failed | refunded
Order Mongo _id — set from partner/customer order list or detail
Appointment Mongo _id — set from partner List appointments or Create
Appointment business id (e.g. AP1001) — alternate path param
order_additional_charge Mongo _id — set from Create additional charge
Order service line _id (service_items[0]._id) — optional when order has one line
Razorpay checkout URL from order payment or quote convert (202 response)
Payment amount for order payments APIs
cash | upi | card | online | bank_transfer | other
Recent reviews limit for GET partners/:partnerId/ratings (max 20)
Page for user post feed / liked / saved lists
Limit for user post feed / liked / saved lists (max 50)

Deep link share token from post create/share
